name: extract_info_from_rfp_chunk
description: Extract and generate RFP fields for the current chunk only. Use the same schema as the full extraction, but only populate fields explicitly supported by this chunk. Use empty arrays where appropriate.

summary.description: Short summary of this RFP part in 1-3 sentences.

fee.description: Any type of fee values mentioned in this chunk. Examples include total_fee, not_to_exceed_fee, contingency_fee, option_pricing, and so on.

fee_type.description: Type of fee, written as a key, ie total_fee, not_to_exceed_fee, etc.

fee.description: Fee details as number if available, else explanation.

pages.description: 1-based page numbers where the fee is found.

date.description: Date entries from this chunk. Return an empty array if none are present.
Date as written in the RFP.

pages.description: 1-based page numbers where the date appears.

diversity_allocation.description: Diversity allocation details from this chunk only. If not present, set diversity_allocation to false, reason to 'Not mentioned in this chunk', and pages to empty array.

reason.description: Reason first to justify the diversity allocation classification.

diversity_allocation.description: True if the RFP has diversity allocation requirements.

pages.description: 1-based page numbers where diversity allocation is discussed.

best_lead_org.description: Generated best lead organization candidates grounded in this chunk plus internal capabilities document. Return an empty array if none are supported by this chunk.

reason.description: Reason first to guide the subsequent selection.

cross_sell_opps.description: Generated cross-sell opportunities grounded in this chunk plus internal capabilities document. Return an empty array if none are supported by this chunk.

reason.description: Reason first to guide the subsequent opportunity.

capabilities_for_rfp.description: Generated capabilities grounded in this chunk plus internal capabilities document. Return an empty array if none are supported by this chunk.

reason.description: Reason first to guide the subsequent capability.
